SEARCH
Module com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.user.impl
Package com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.rules.impl

Class ViewRiskScoreEvolution

java.lang.Object
com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.rules.impl.ViewRiskScoreEvolution
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.io.Serializable
@Entity(name="ViewRiskScoreEvolution") public class ViewRiskScoreEvolution extends java.lang.Object implements java.io.Serializable
JPA entity for view_risk_score_evolution database view. Intelligence Purpose: Track temporal evolution of risk scores with severity classification and trend analysis. Critical for all 45 rules. Created by: Liquibase v1.30 (OSINT Performance Tracking) Risk Rules Supported: All 45 rules (cross-cutting risk assessment) Monthly risk score calculation with severity escalation tracking
See Also:
